heading: Air National Guard of the United States: status when not in Federal service
label: 10113 Air National Guard of the United States: status when not in Federal service
text: When not on active duty, members of the Air National Guard of the United States shall be administered, armed, equipped, and trained in their status as members of the Air National Guard.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , prior to repeal by .section 8079 of this titlePub. L. 103–337, § 1661(a)(3)(A)
